g.text: seal for trucks, trailers and tankers.
Gateway for handless digital monitoring of seal status, closing codes and audit
trails. From connection to reporting in the cloud.
All closure data (codes & status) is provided fully digital
The status of the security seal is provided digitally
The digital seal divide has a battery life of 8 years
Daily audit trails of alle codes and all lock status with
timestamps are provided via the Gateway.
usable system that avoids all plastic residues
Monthly service fee for all services included
